# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

---
# Declarative configuration for Kong API Gateway
_format_version: "1.1"
services:
  - name: my-service-1
    host: localhost
    port: 8080
    routes:
      - path: /users
        methods: ["GET"]
        upstreams:
          - url: http://user-service:80/users
            name: user-service
  - name: my-service-2
    host: localhost
    port: 9090
    routes:
      - path: /products
        methods: ["GET"]
        upstreams:
          - url: http://product-service:80/products
            name: product-service
upstreams:
  - name: user-service
    targets:
      - host: localhost
        port: 80
  - name: product-service
    targets:
      - host: localhost
        port: 90
plugins:
  - name: basic-auth
    config:
      hide_credentials: false
      anonymous:
        enabled: true
